description.text: Kilogram Per Second (kg/s) is a unit in the category of Mass flow rate. It is also known as kilogram/second, kilograms per second. This unit is commonly used in the SI unit system. Kilogram Per Second (kg/s) has a dimension of $MT^{-1}$ where $M$ is mass, and $T$ is time. This unit is the standard SI unit in this category.
